title: Chronicles: Tharidia
description: This is a medieval-fantasy roleplay enviroment, with custom feature, mobs, world dynamics, custom classes
body:
# Tharidia

--- ## ⚔️ Welcome to Tharidia **Tharidia** is an MMO-RPG sandbox modpack set in a medieval fantasy world where every choice matters. It's not just another survival experience: it's an immersive roleplay journey where you'll build your destiny, forge alliances, conquer territories, and live epic adventures alongside other players. > *"In Tharidia, you're not just a player. You're a hero, a merchant, a conqueror, a craftsman. Your story begins here."* --- ## What Awaits You ### ⚔️ Skill-Based Combat > Tharidia's combat is **dynamic and tactical**, inspired by Souls-Like games. ### 🏰 Build Your Kingdom > Will you conquer or be conquered? ### 🧙 Class and Magic System > - Create your path among **Warriors**, **Artisans**, and **Mages**. > - Make your character unique and hone their abilities. ### 🏔️ Dungeons and PvE > - **Procedural Dungeons** — Mob waves, bosses, epic loot. > - **Progressive Floors** — Level up, increase difficulty, obtain better loot. ### 🛠️ Advanced Crafting > Knowing a recipe isn't enough to forge a quality sword. ### 💰 Living Economy > Join a caravan and expand your business. --- ## 📋 Technical Features | Feature | Detail | |---------|--------| | **Minecraft Version** | 1.21.1 | | **Mod Loader** | NeoForge | | **Total Mods** | ~266 | | **Recommended RAM** | 7GB+ | | **Multiplayer** | Server-optimized | --- ## 🔗 Useful Links

--- ## 🏷️ Tags `mmo` `rpg` `medieval` `fantasy` `roleplay` `pvp` `pve` `classes` `magic` `economy` `towny` `dungeons` `survival` `crafting` `epic-fight` `skill-based` `multiplayer` `server` --- ## ⚠️ Important Notes - **This modpack is designed for a multiplayer server** — The full experience requires access to the Tharidia server - **In active development** — New features are added regularly ---

Forge your destiny. Conquer Tharidia.
